idea.title: Mirror Match
idea.hook: Two armies on opposite sides of the board move in perfect mirror to your input — find the one move that lets your knight escape while the enemy mirror crashes into its own wall.
idea.hook_ru: Две фигуры на противоположных сторонах двигаются зеркально вашему вводу — найдите единственный ход, при котором ваш конь сбегает, а вражеский врежется в стену.
idea.prototype: 12×12 board. Player unit (white knight, top-left) + enemy unit (black knight, bottom-right) controlled by SAME directional input — enemy moves the exact mirror (left↔right, up↔down). 8 wall tiles per side asymmetrically placed by daily seed. Enemy hits wall → skips turn. Player reaches bottom-right exit, enemy tries to reach top-left exit. First-to-exit wins. 30-turn budget.
idea.mutation_of: reddit r/WebGames 'Spark Relay' (two pieces in coordination) + Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe coupled-move pattern + Crazygames 'Chaos Arena' / 'Soldiers - Capture and Control'.
idea.why_novel: No portal has a coupled-mirror-input puzzle. Asymmetric walls create strategy — same input has different outcomes on each side. Players must visualize the mirror simultaneously.
idea.non_timer_pressure: 30-turn move budget + race with mirror opponent + asymmetric wall layout (no countdown)
idea.lose_condition: Enemy reaches top-left exit before player reaches bottom-right OR 30 turns elapse with neither there.

sources.title: Spark Relay - a small puzzle game about leaving paths for the other piece
sources.snippet: Two-piece coordination puzzle — solver has to think about both pieces simultaneously. Direct inspiration for the mirror-input twist.

sources.title: Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe with online multiplayer (Super Jump Pad)
sources.snippet: Coupled-move pattern — your move on board A constrains the opponent's board choice on B. Mirror Match takes the coupling all the way: ONE input drives BOTH pieces simultaneously.

sources.title: Chaos Arena
sources.snippet: Two-side simultaneous-action arena — single input affecting opposing units. Provides the mass-appeal hook for the mirror-input mechanic.

sources.title: Soldiers - Capture and Control
sources.snippet: Grid race-to-corner pattern with limited move budget. Mirror Match keeps the race but couples it across two boards.

synthesizer_brief: Synthesis pick: combine Spark Relay's two-piece coordination with Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe's coupled-move discipline, then layer Chaos Arena / Soldiers' grid-race tension. The novel piece is single-input → mirrored output on asymmetric boards. No portal ships this exact coupling.

alternatives.title: Echo Cartographer
alternatives.hook: Ping unseen caves with sonar pulses and draw the map yourself by clicking where you THINK the walls are — earn points for accuracy, lose pings for guesses.
alternatives.why_novel: Player commits predictions before knowing — pure deduction tension.

alternatives.title: Reverse Tycoon
alternatives.hook: Inherit a thriving cafe and DEMOLISH it tile by tile to satisfy creditors — but each demolition kills the customers funding next debt payment.
alternatives.mutation_of: Monkey Mart / My Perfect Hotel inverted + Bills Must Be Paid
alternatives.why_novel: Zero shipped games where the loop is destruction-for-cash with synergy collapse.

alternatives.title: Anti-Match
alternatives.hook: Match-3 inverted: NEVER form a row of three same-color gems or the row explodes and shrinks your column.
alternatives.mutation_of: Yandex match-3 sort signal stack inverted
alternatives.why_novel: Every match game rewards matching — none punish them.

alternatives.title: Wishlist Saboteur
alternatives.hook: Drag your rival's Steam capsule features into the WRONG genre bucket to tank their algorithm placement.
alternatives.mutation_of: Demo Trimmer reverse-knapsack + Wishlist Climb inverted polarity
